set.body: R-universe source-build step fails for both Apple-only backends, so Apple Silicon users cannot install.packages('amatrix.mlx') — breaks the flagship convenience story. Likely configure failing hard on the Linux source builder; R CMD build must succeed anywhere (defer all platform checks to install time / mock bridge). Acceptance: R-universe shows source OK + macOS binaries; fresh-library install of amatrix.mlx works on Apple Silicon.
set.title: R-universe: amatrix.mlx and amatrix.metal fail source build (Version: None) — uninstallable
